subject: Debra — CPAs in Troy are spending 5.0+ hours/week on this
body:
Hi Debra,

I built a tool that turns IRS transcripts into plain-English reports in seconds — specifically for CPAs who are done spending 20 minutes per client translating transaction codes manually. I'm an EA myself, so I built it from the same frustration.

At 5.0 hours per week, that adds up to 260 hours a year of work that should take seconds. Transcript Tax Monitor Pro handles it for $19 per 10 analyses, with nothing to install.

Here's a free IRS code lookup to try first, no account needed:

If any of this lands, I'd be glad to show you a live analysis on a real transcript — 15 minutes on Google Meet.
https://cal.com/tax-monitor-pro/ttmp-discovery?slug=debra-accurso-troy-mi

Jamie L Williams, EA
Founder, Transcript Tax Monitor Pro
